series_metadata.series_description: Alphabetical files by vendor of agency purchase orders to include requisitions and supporting documentation to these request, e.g. bids, signature approvals, pricing and copies of invoices. Requisitions and purchase orders authorizing the purchase of goods and services for direct purchases, contracts and other agreements.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office for 1 year, until audited by the Auditor of State and audited report is released and discrepancies are resolved, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office for 3 year, until audited by the Auditor of State and audited report is released and discrepancies are resolved, then destroy ., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
